42	//go:generate go tool counterfeiter -generate
43	
44	//counterfeiter:generate . Provisioner
45	
46	// Provisioner is an interface for triggering NGINX resources to be created/updated/deleted.
47	type Provisioner interface {
48		RegisterGateway(ctx context.Context, gateway *graph.Gateway, resourceName string) error
49	}
50	
51	// Config is the configuration for the Provisioner.
52	type Config struct {
53		DeploymentStore  agent.DeploymentStorer
54		EventRecorder    k8sEvents.EventRecorder
55		PlusUsageConfig  *config.UsageReportConfig
56		StatusQueue      *status.Queue
57		GatewayPodConfig *config.GatewayPodConfig
58		AgentLabels      map[string]string
59		Logger           logr.Logger
60		GCName           string
61		NGINXSCCName     string
62		// GatewayCtlrName is the controller name string (from main config)
63		GatewayCtlrName                string
64		AgentTLSSecretName             string
65		ServerTLSDomain                string
66		NginxDockerSecretNames         []string
67		NginxOneConsoleTelemetryConfig config.NginxOneConsoleTelemetryConfig
68		Plus                           bool
69		InferenceExtension             bool
70		EndpointPickerDisableTLS       bool
71		EndpointPickerTLSSkipVerify    bool
72	}
73	
74	// NginxProvisioner handles provisioning nginx kubernetes resources.
75	type NginxProvisioner struct {
76		k8sClient         client.Client
77		store             *store
78		baseLabelSelector metav1.LabelSelector
79		// resourcesToDeleteOnStartup contains a list of Gateway names that no longer exist
80		// but have nginx resources tied to them that need to be deleted.
81		resourcesToDeleteOnStartup []types.NamespacedName
82		cfg                        Config
83		lock                       sync.RWMutex
84		leader                     bool
85		isOpenshift                bool
86	}
87	
88	var apiChecker openshift.APIChecker = &openshift.APICheckerImpl{}
89	
90	var labelCollectorFactory func(mgr manager.Manager, cfg Config) AgentLabelCollector = defaultLabelCollectorFactory
91	
92	func defaultLabelCollectorFactory(mgr manager.Manager, cfg Config) AgentLabelCollector {
93		return telemetry.NewLabelCollector(telemetry.LabelCollectorConfig{
94			K8sClientReader: mgr.GetAPIReader(),
95			Version:         cfg.GatewayPodConfig.Version,
96			PodNSName: types.NamespacedName{
97				Namespace: cfg.GatewayPodConfig.Namespace,
98				Name:      cfg.GatewayPodConfig.Name,
99			},
100		})
101	}
102	
103	type AgentLabelCollector interface {
104		Collect(ctx context.Context) (map[string]string, error)
105	}
106	
107	// NewNginxProvisioner returns a new instance of a Provisioner that will deploy nginx resources.
108	func NewNginxProvisioner(
109		ctx context.Context,
110		mgr manager.Manager,
111		cfg Config,
112	) (*NginxProvisioner, *events.EventLoop, error) {
113		var jwtSecretName, caSecretName, clientSSLSecretName string
114		if cfg.Plus && cfg.PlusUsageConfig != nil {
115			jwtSecretName = cfg.PlusUsageConfig.SecretName
116			caSecretName = cfg.PlusUsageConfig.CASecretName
117			clientSSLSecretName = cfg.PlusUsageConfig.ClientSSLSecretName
118		}
119	
120		var dataplaneKeySecretName string
121		if cfg.NginxOneConsoleTelemetryConfig.DataplaneKeySecretName != "" {
122			dataplaneKeySecretName = cfg.NginxOneConsoleTelemetryConfig.DataplaneKeySecretName
123		}
124	
125		store := newStore(
126			cfg.NginxDockerSecretNames,
127			cfg.AgentTLSSecretName,
128			jwtSecretName,
129			caSecretName,
130			clientSSLSecretName,
131			dataplaneKeySecretName,
132		)
133	
134		selector := metav1.LabelSelector{
135			MatchLabels: map[string]string{
136				controller.AppInstanceLabel: cfg.GatewayPodConfig.InstanceName,
137				controller.AppManagedByLabel: controller.CreateNginxResourceName(
138					cfg.GatewayPodConfig.InstanceName,
139					cfg.GCName,
140				),
141			},
142		}
143	
144		isOpenshift, err := apiChecker.IsOpenshift(mgr.GetConfig())
145		if err != nil {
146			cfg.Logger.Error(err, "could not determine if running in openshift, will not create Role/RoleBinding")
147		}
148	
149		agentLabelCollector := labelCollectorFactory(mgr, cfg)
150		agentLabels, err := agentLabelCollector.Collect(ctx)
151		if err != nil {
152			cfg.Logger.Error(err, "failed to collect agent labels")
153		}
154		cfg.AgentLabels = agentLabels
155		if cfg.AgentLabels == nil {
156			cfg.AgentLabels = make(map[string]string)
157		}
158	
159		provisioner := &NginxProvisioner{
160			k8sClient:                  mgr.GetClient(),
161			store:                      store,
162			baseLabelSelector:          selector,
163			resourcesToDeleteOnStartup: []types.NamespacedName{},
164			cfg:                        cfg,
165			isOpenshift:                isOpenshift,
166		}
167	
168		handler, err := newEventHandler(store, provisioner, mgr.GetClient(), selector, cfg.GCName)
169		if err != nil {
170			return nil, nil, fmt.Errorf("error initializing eventHandler: %w", err)
171		}
172	
173		eventLoop, err := newEventLoop(
174			ctx,
175			mgr,
176			handler,
177			cfg.Logger,
178			selector,
179			cfg.GatewayPodConfig.Namespace,
180			cfg.NginxDockerSecretNames,
181			cfg.AgentTLSSecretName,
182			dataplaneKeySecretName,
183			cfg.PlusUsageConfig,
184			isOpenshift,
185		)
186		if err != nil {
187			return nil, nil, err
188		}
189	
190		return provisioner, eventLoop, nil
191	}
192	
193	// Enable is called when the Pod becomes leader and allows the provisioner to manage resources.
194	func (p *NginxProvisioner) Enable(ctx context.Context) {
195		p.lock.Lock()
196		p.leader = true
197		p.lock.Unlock()
198	
199		p.lock.RLock()
200		for _, gatewayNSName := range p.resourcesToDeleteOnStartup {
201			if p.store.getGateway(gatewayNSName) != nil {
202				continue
203			}
204			if err := p.deprovisionNginxForInvalidGateway(ctx, gatewayNSName); err != nil {
205				p.cfg.Logger.Error(err, "error deprovisioning nginx resources on startup")
206			}
207		}
208		p.lock.RUnlock()
209	
210		p.lock.Lock()
211		p.resourcesToDeleteOnStartup = []types.NamespacedName{}
212		p.lock.Unlock()
213	}
214	
215	// isLeader returns whether or not this provisioner is the leader.
216	func (p *NginxProvisioner) isLeader() bool {
217		p.lock.RLock()
218		defer p.lock.RUnlock()
219	
220		return p.leader
221	}
222	
223	// setResourceToDelete is called when there are resources to delete, but this pod is not leader.
224	// Once it becomes leader, it will delete those resources.
225	func (p *NginxProvisioner) setResourceToDelete(gatewayNSName types.NamespacedName) {
226		p.lock.Lock()
227		defer p.lock.Unlock()
228	
229		p.resourcesToDeleteOnStartup = append(p.resourcesToDeleteOnStartup, gatewayNSName)
230	}
231	
232	// patchServiceStatus updates the Service.status.loadBalancer.ingress with the provided IPs.
233	func (p *NginxProvisioner) patchServiceStatus(ctx context.Context, namespace, name string, ips []string) error {
234		if len(ips) == 0 {
235			return nil
236		}
237	
238		svc := &corev1.Service{}
239		key := types.NamespacedName{Namespace: namespace, Name: name}
240		if err := p.k8sClient.Get(ctx, key, svc); err != nil {
241			return fmt.Errorf("failed to get Service for status patch: %w", err)
242		}
243	
244		// Ensure this Service appears to belong to NGF by checking managed-by and instance labels.
245		// If it doesn't, avoid modifying status of unrelated Services.
246		managedBy := svc.Labels[controller.AppManagedByLabel]
247		instance := svc.Labels[controller.AppInstanceLabel]
248		expectedManagedBy := controller.CreateNginxResourceName(p.cfg.GatewayPodConfig.InstanceName, p.cfg.GCName)
249		if instance != p.cfg.GatewayPodConfig.InstanceName || managedBy != expectedManagedBy {
250			p.cfg.Logger.V(1).Info(
251				"skipping status patch for Service that is not managed by NGF",
252				"service", fmt.Sprintf("%s/%s", namespace, name),
253			)
254			return nil
255		}
256	
257		// Build a map of existing ingress entries
258		ingress := createUniqueIngressList(svc, ips)
259	
260		// If the desired IPs already match the existing IPs (order-sensitive), nothing to do.
261		existingIPs := make([]string, 0, len(svc.Status.LoadBalancer.Ingress))
262		for _, ingress := range svc.Status.LoadBalancer.Ingress {
263			existingIPs = append(existingIPs, ingress.IP)
264		}
265		desiredIPs := make([]string, 0, len(ingress))
266		for _, ingress := range ingress {
267			desiredIPs = append(desiredIPs, ingress.IP)
268		}
269		if slices.Equal(existingIPs, desiredIPs) {
270			return nil
271		}
272	
273		// Patch the status subresource using MergeFrom to avoid clobbering concurrent updates.
274		original := svc.DeepCopy()
275		svc.Status.LoadBalancer.Ingress = ingress
276	
277		backoff := wait.Backoff{Steps: 5, Duration: 100 * time.Millisecond, Factor: 2.0, Jitter: 0.1}
278		err := wait.ExponentialBackoff(backoff, func() (bool, error) {
279			if err := p.k8sClient.Status().Patch(ctx, svc, client.MergeFrom(original)); err != nil {
280				p.cfg.Logger.V(1).Info(
281					"Encountered error patching service status",
282					"error", err,
283					"namespace", svc.Namespace,
284					"name", svc.Name,
285					"kind", svc.GetObjectKind().GroupVersionKind().Kind,
286				)
287	
288				if apierrors.IsConflict(err) {
289					// Refresh original and svc and retry
290					if getErr := p.k8sClient.Get(ctx, key, original); getErr != nil {
291						if apierrors.IsNotFound(getErr) {
292							return true, getErr
293						}
294						return false, nil
295					}
296					// apply desired ingress onto a fresh copy
297					svc = original.DeepCopy()
298					svc.Status.LoadBalancer.Ingress = ingress
299					return false, nil
300				}
301	
302				return false, nil
303			}
304	
305			return true, nil
306		})
307		if err != nil {
308			return fmt.Errorf("failed to patch Service status: %w", err)
309		}
310	
311		return nil
312	}
313	
314	// createUniqueIngressList takes the existing Service and the desired list of IPs,
315	// and returns a list of LoadBalancerIngress.
316	func createUniqueIngressList(svc *corev1.Service, ips []string) []corev1.LoadBalancerIngress {
317		existingByIP := make(map[string]corev1.LoadBalancerIngress, len(svc.Status.LoadBalancer.Ingress))
318		for _, ingress := range svc.Status.LoadBalancer.Ingress {
319			existingByIP[ingress.IP] = ingress
320		}
321	
322		// Build unique ingress list preserving order and any existing fields.
323		seen := make(map[string]struct{})
324		ingress := make([]corev1.LoadBalancerIngress, 0, len(ips))
325		for _, ip := range ips {
326			if ip == "" || net.ParseIP(ip) == nil {
327				continue
328			}
329			if _, ok := seen[ip]; ok {
330				continue
331			}
332			seen[ip] = struct{}{}
333			if existing, ok := existingByIP[ip]; ok {
334				ingress = append(ingress, existing)
335			} else {
336				ingress = append(ingress, corev1.LoadBalancerIngress{IP: ip})
337			}
338		}
339		return ingress
340	}

342	// minimalObjectFactory is a map of constructors for creating minimal objects with only name and namespace set.
343	var minimalObjectFactory = map[reflect.Type]func(name, namespace string) client.Object{
344		reflect.TypeOf(&appsv1.Deployment{}): func(name, namespace string) client.Object {
345			return &appsv1.Deployment{ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Name: name, Namespace: namespace}}
346		},
347		reflect.TypeOf(&appsv1.DaemonSet{}): func(name, namespace string) client.Object {
348			return &appsv1.DaemonSet{ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Name: name, Namespace: namespace}}
349		},
350		reflect.TypeOf(&corev1.Service{}): func(name, namespace string) client.Object {
351			return &corev1.Service{ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Name: name, Namespace: namespace}}
352		},
353		reflect.TypeOf(&corev1.ServiceAccount{}): func(name, namespace string) client.Object {
354			return &corev1.ServiceAccount{ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Name: name, Namespace: namespace}}
355		},
356		reflect.TypeOf(&corev1.ConfigMap{}): func(name, namespace string) client.Object {
357			return &corev1.ConfigMap{ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Name: name, Namespace: namespace}}
358		},
359		reflect.TypeOf(&corev1.Secret{}): func(name, namespace string) client.Object {
360			return &corev1.Secret{ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Name: name, Namespace: namespace}}
361		},
362		reflect.TypeOf(&rbacv1.Role{}): func(name, namespace string) client.Object {
363			return &rbacv1.Role{ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Name: name, Namespace: namespace}}
364		},
365		reflect.TypeOf(&rbacv1.RoleBinding{}): func(name, namespace string) client.Object {
366			return &rbacv1.RoleBinding{ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Name: name, Namespace: namespace}}
367		},
368		reflect.TypeOf(&autoscalingv2.HorizontalPodAutoscaler{}): func(name, namespace string) client.Object {
369			return &autoscalingv2.HorizontalPodAutoscaler{ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Name: name, Namespace: namespace}}
370		},
371		reflect.TypeOf(&policyv1.PodDisruptionBudget{}): func(name, namespace string) client.Object {
372			return &policyv1.PodDisruptionBudget{ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Name: name, Namespace: namespace}}
373		},
374	}
375	
376	// createMinimalClone creates a new object of the same type with only name and namespace set.
377	// This follows CreateOrUpdate's requirement that only name/namespace should be set on the input object.
378	func createMinimalClone(obj client.Object) client.Object {
379		objType := reflect.TypeOf(obj)
380		factory, exists := minimalObjectFactory[objType]
381		if !exists {
382			panic(fmt.Errorf("failed to create minimal clone: no factory mapping for object type %T", obj))
383		}
384	
385		// A new object will be created by this factory function
386		return factory(obj.GetName(), obj.GetNamespace())
387	}

389	func (p *NginxProvisioner) provisionNginx(
390		ctx context.Context,
391		resourceName string,
392		gateway *gatewayv1.Gateway,
393		objects []client.Object,
394	) error {
395		if !p.isLeader() {
396			return nil
397		}
398	
399		objNames := make([]string, 0, len(objects))
400		for _, obj := range objects {
401			objNames = append(objNames, fmt.Sprintf("%s (%s)", obj.GetName(), reflect.TypeOf(obj).Elem().Name()))
402		}
403	
404		p.cfg.Logger.Info(
405			"Creating/Updating nginx resources",
406			"namespace", gateway.GetNamespace(),
407			"nginx resource name", resourceName,
408			"resource names", objNames,
409		)
410	
411		var state nginxProvisionState
412		for _, obj := range objects {
413			minimalObj, res, err := p.createOrUpdateNginxResource(ctx, resourceName, gateway, obj)
414			if err != nil {
415				return err
416			}
417	
418			state.track(minimalObj, res)
419	
420			// If the Service is a LoadBalancer and the Gateway declares IP-type addresses,
421			// patch the Service status with those IPs.
422			if svc, ok := minimalObj.(*corev1.Service); ok {
423				p.patchLoadBalancerServiceStatus(ctx, svc, gateway)
424			}
425	
426			if res != controllerutil.OperationResultCreated && res != controllerutil.OperationResultUpdated {
427				p.cfg.Logger.V(1).Info(
428					"nginx resource already up to date with this result: "+string(res),
429					"namespace", gateway.GetNamespace(),
430					"name", fmt.Sprintf("%s (%s)", resourceName, reflect.TypeOf(minimalObj).Elem().Name()),
431				)
432				continue
433			}
434	
435			result := cases.Title(language.English, cases.Compact).String(string(res))
436			p.cfg.Logger.V(1).Info(
437				fmt.Sprintf("%s nginx %s", result, reflect.TypeOf(minimalObj).Elem().Name()),
438				"namespace", gateway.GetNamespace(),
439				"name", resourceName,
440			)
441			p.store.registerResourceInGatewayConfig(client.ObjectKeyFromObject(gateway), minimalObj)
442		}
443	
444		// if agent configmap was updated, then we'll need to restart the deployment/daemonset
445		return p.restartNginxAfterConfigUpdate(ctx, gateway, state)
446	}
447	
448	// nginxProvisionState tracks the resources observed while provisioning a Gateway's nginx objects,
449	// so that an agent ConfigMap update can trigger a restart of the corresponding Deployment/DaemonSet.
450	type nginxProvisionState struct {
451		deploymentObj         *appsv1.Deployment
452		daemonSetObj          *appsv1.DaemonSet
453		agentConfigMapUpdated bool
454		deploymentCreated     bool
455	}
456	
457	// track records the result of creating or updating a single nginx resource.
458	func (s *nginxProvisionState) track(minimalObj client.Object, res controllerutil.OperationResult) {
459		switch o := minimalObj.(type) {
460		case *appsv1.Deployment:
461			s.deploymentObj = o
462			if res == controllerutil.OperationResultCreated {
463				s.deploymentCreated = true
464			}
465		case *appsv1.DaemonSet:
466			s.daemonSetObj = o
467			if res == controllerutil.OperationResultCreated {
468				s.deploymentCreated = true
469			}
470		case *corev1.ConfigMap:
471			if res == controllerutil.OperationResultUpdated &&
472				strings.HasSuffix(minimalObj.GetName(), nginxAgentConfigMapNameSuffix) {
473				s.agentConfigMapUpdated = true
474			}
475		}
476	}
477	
478	// createOrUpdateNginxResource creates or updates a single nginx resource, retrying on transient
479	// errors. It returns the minimal clone that was reconciled along with the operation result. On
480	// failure it records a warning event on the Gateway and returns the error.
481	func (p *NginxProvisioner) createOrUpdateNginxResource(
482		ctx context.Context,
483		resourceName string,
484		gateway *gatewayv1.Gateway,
485		obj client.Object,
486	) (client.Object, controllerutil.OperationResult, error) {
487		// Create a minimal clone with only name and namespace for CreateOrUpdate
488		// This follows the CreateOrUpdate documentation that says only name/namespace should be set
489		minimalObj := createMinimalClone(obj)
490	
491		createCtx, cancel := context.WithTimeout(ctx, 30*time.Second)
492		defer cancel()
493	
494		var res controllerutil.OperationResult
495		var upsertErr error
496		if err := wait.PollUntilContextCancel(
497			createCtx,
498			500*time.Millisecond,
499			true, /* poll immediately */
500			func(ctx context.Context) (bool, error) {
501				// Use minimalObj for CreateOrUpdate but pass both to objectSpecSetter so we can transfer
502				// the desired spec and other meta details of the object
503				res, upsertErr = controllerutil.CreateOrUpdate(ctx, p.k8sClient, minimalObj, objectSpecSetter(minimalObj, obj))
504	
505				if upsertErr != nil {
506					if apierrors.IsInvalid(upsertErr) { // log this error at the error level
507						// spec.loadBalancerClass is immutable in Kubernetes; it cannot be changed after
508						// a Service is created. We cannot delete and recreate the Service because that
509						// would release and re-allocate the external IP, breaking DNS for users.
510						// Return the error to stop retrying; the outer handler will log and surface it.
511						if _, ok := obj.(*corev1.Service); ok && isLoadBalancerClassImmutabilityErr(upsertErr) {
512							return false, upsertErr
513						}
514						p.cfg.Logger.Error(
515							upsertErr,
516							"Retrying CreateOrUpdate for nginx resource after error",
517							"namespace", gateway.GetNamespace(),
518							"name", fmt.Sprintf("%s (%s)", resourceName, reflect.TypeOf(obj).Elem().Name()),
519						)
520					} else {
521						p.cfg.Logger.V(1).Info(
522							"Retrying CreateOrUpdate for nginx resource after error",
523							"namespace", gateway.GetNamespace(),
524							"name", fmt.Sprintf("%s (%s)", resourceName, reflect.TypeOf(obj).Elem().Name()),
525							"error", upsertErr.Error(),
526						)
527					}
528					return false, nil
529				}
530				return true, nil
531			},
532		); err != nil {
533			p.cfg.Logger.Error(
534				err,
535				"Failed to CreateOrUpdate nginx resource after retries",
536				"namespace", gateway.GetNamespace(),
537				"name", fmt.Sprintf("%s (%s)", resourceName, reflect.TypeOf(obj).Elem().Name()),
538			)
539	
540			fullErr := errors.Join(err, upsertErr)
541			p.cfg.EventRecorder.Eventf(
542				obj,
543				gateway,
544				corev1.EventTypeWarning,
545				"CreateOrUpdateFailed",
546				"None",
547				"Failed to create or update nginx resource: %s",
548				fullErr.Error(),
549			)
550			return nil, res, fullErr
551		}
552	
553		return minimalObj, res, nil
554	}
555	
556	// patchLoadBalancerServiceStatus patches a LoadBalancer Service's status with the Gateway's
557	// IP-type addresses when the Service is managed by this controller. Patch failures are logged
558	// but not returned, since they should not block provisioning.
559	func (p *NginxProvisioner) patchLoadBalancerServiceStatus(
560		ctx context.Context,
561		svc *corev1.Service,
562		gateway *gatewayv1.Gateway,
563	) {
564		if svc.Spec.Type != corev1.ServiceTypeLoadBalancer {
565			return
566		}
567	
568		var ips []string
569		for _, addr := range gateway.Spec.Addresses {
570			if addr.Type != nil && *addr.Type == gatewayv1.IPAddressType {
571				ips = append(ips, addr.Value)
572			}
573		}
574	
575		if svc.Spec.LoadBalancerClass != nil && *svc.Spec.LoadBalancerClass == p.cfg.GatewayCtlrName && len(ips) > 0 {
576			if err := p.patchServiceStatus(ctx, svc.GetNamespace(), svc.GetName(), ips); err != nil {
577				p.cfg.Logger.Error(
578					err,
579					"failed to patch Service status with gateway external IPs",
580					"service", fmt.Sprintf("%s/%s", svc.GetNamespace(), svc.GetName()),
581				)
582			}
583		}
584	}
585	
586	// restartNginxAfterConfigUpdate restarts the provisioned Deployment/DaemonSet when the agent
587	// ConfigMap was updated without the workload itself being newly created, so that nginx picks up
588	// the new agent configuration.
589	func (p *NginxProvisioner) restartNginxAfterConfigUpdate(
590		ctx context.Context,
591		gateway *gatewayv1.Gateway,
592		state nginxProvisionState,
593	) error {
594		if !state.agentConfigMapUpdated || state.deploymentCreated {
595			return nil
596		}
597	
598		updateCtx, cancel := context.WithTimeout(ctx, 30*time.Second)
599		defer cancel()
600	
601		var object client.Object
602		if state.deploymentObj != nil {
603			if state.deploymentObj.Spec.Template.Annotations == nil {
604				state.deploymentObj.Spec.Template.Annotations = make(map[string]string)
605			}
606			state.deploymentObj.Spec.Template.Annotations[controller.RestartedAnnotation] = time.Now().Format(time.RFC3339)
607			object = state.deploymentObj
608		} else if state.daemonSetObj != nil {
609			if state.daemonSetObj.Spec.Template.Annotations == nil {
610				state.daemonSetObj.Spec.Template.Annotations = make(map[string]string)
611			}
612			state.daemonSetObj.Spec.Template.Annotations[controller.RestartedAnnotation] = time.Now().Format(time.RFC3339)
613			object = state.daemonSetObj
614		}
615	
616		if object == nil {
617			return nil
618		}
619	
620		p.cfg.Logger.V(1).Info(
621			"Restarting nginx after agent configmap update",
622			"name", object.GetName(),
623			"namespace", object.GetNamespace(),
624		)
625	
626		if err := p.k8sClient.Update(updateCtx, object); err != nil && !apierrors.IsConflict(err) {
627			p.cfg.EventRecorder.Eventf(
628				object,
629				gateway,
630				corev1.EventTypeWarning,
631				"RestartFailed",
632				"None",
633				"Failed to restart nginx after agent config update: %s",
634				err.Error(),
635			)
636			return err
637		}
638	
639		return nil
640	}

642	func (p *NginxProvisioner) reprovisionNginx(
643		ctx context.Context,
644		resourceName string,
645		gateway *gatewayv1.Gateway,
646		nProxyCfg *graph.EffectiveNginxProxy,
647		allListeners []*graph.Listener,
648	) error {
649		if !p.isLeader() {
650			return nil
651		}
652		if len(allListeners) == 0 {
653			return nil
654		}
655		objects, err := p.buildNginxResourceObjects(resourceName, gateway, nProxyCfg, allListeners)
656		if err != nil {
657			p.cfg.Logger.Error(err, "error provisioning some nginx resources")
658		}
659	
660		p.cfg.Logger.Info(
661			"Re-creating nginx resources",
662			"namespace", gateway.GetNamespace(),
663			"name", resourceName,
664		)
665	
666		createCtx, cancel := context.WithTimeout(ctx, 30*time.Second)
667		defer cancel()
668	
669		for _, obj := range objects {
670			if err := p.k8sClient.Create(createCtx, obj); err != nil && !apierrors.IsAlreadyExists(err) {
671				p.cfg.EventRecorder.Eventf(
672					obj,
673					gateway,
674					corev1.EventTypeWarning,
675					"CreateFailed",
676					"None",
677					"Failed to create nginx resource: %s",
678					err.Error(),
679				)
680				return err
681			}
682		}
683	
684		return nil
685	}

687	func (p *NginxProvisioner) deprovisionNginxForInvalidGateway(
688		ctx context.Context,
689		gatewayNSName types.NamespacedName,
690	) error {
691		deploymentNSName := types.NamespacedName{
692			Name:      controller.CreateNginxResourceName(gatewayNSName.Name, p.cfg.GCName),
693			Namespace: gatewayNSName.Namespace,
694		}
695	
696		if p.isLeader() {
697			p.cfg.Logger.Info(
698				"Removing nginx resources for Gateway",
699				"name", gatewayNSName.Name,
700				"namespace", gatewayNSName.Namespace,
701			)
702	
703			objects := p.buildResourcesForInvalidGatewayCleanup(deploymentNSName)
704	
705			deleteCtx, cancel := context.WithTimeout(ctx, 30*time.Second)
706			defer cancel()
707	
708			for _, obj := range objects {
709				if err := p.k8sClient.Delete(deleteCtx, obj); err != nil && !apierrors.IsNotFound(err) {
710					p.cfg.EventRecorder.Eventf(
711						obj,
712						&gatewayv1.Gateway{
713							ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{
714								Name:      gatewayNSName.Name,
715								Namespace: gatewayNSName.Namespace,
716							},
717						},
718						corev1.EventTypeWarning,
719						"DeleteFailed",
720						"None",
721						"Failed to delete nginx resource: %s",
722						err.Error(),
723					)
724					return err
725				}
726			}
727		}
728	
729		p.store.deleteResourcesForGateway(gatewayNSName)
730		p.cfg.DeploymentStore.Remove(deploymentNSName)
731	
732		return nil
733	}

735	func (p *NginxProvisioner) deleteObject(ctx context.Context, obj client.Object) error {
736		if !p.isLeader() {
737			return nil
738		}
739	
740		deleteCtx, cancel := context.WithTimeout(ctx, 10*time.Second)
741		defer cancel()
742	
743		if err := p.k8sClient.Delete(deleteCtx, obj); err != nil && !apierrors.IsNotFound(err) {
744			p.cfg.EventRecorder.Eventf(
745				obj,
746				nil,
747				corev1.EventTypeWarning,
748				"DeleteFailed",
749				"None",
750				"Failed to delete nginx resource: %s",
751				err.Error(),
752			)
753			return err
754		}
755	
756		return nil
757	}

759	// isUserSecret determines if the provided secret name is a special user secret,
760	// for example an NGINX docker registry secret or NGINX Plus secret.
761	func (p *NginxProvisioner) isUserSecret(name string) bool {
762		if name == p.cfg.AgentTLSSecretName {
763			return true
764		}
765	
766		if slices.Contains(p.cfg.NginxDockerSecretNames, name) {
767			return true
768		}
769	
770		if p.cfg.NginxOneConsoleTelemetryConfig.DataplaneKeySecretName == name {
771			return true
772		}
773	
774		if p.cfg.PlusUsageConfig != nil {
775			return name == p.cfg.PlusUsageConfig.SecretName ||
776				name == p.cfg.PlusUsageConfig.CASecretName ||
777				name == p.cfg.PlusUsageConfig.ClientSSLSecretName
778		}
779	
780		return false
781	}
782	
783	// RegisterGateway is called by the main event handler when a Gateway API resource event occurs
784	// and the graph is built. The provisioner updates the Gateway config in the store and then:
785	// - If it's a valid Gateway, create or update nginx resources associated with the Gateway, if necessary.
786	// - If it's an invalid Gateway, delete the associated nginx resources.
787	func (p *NginxProvisioner) RegisterGateway(
788		ctx context.Context,
789		gateway *graph.Gateway,
790		resourceName string,
791	) error {
792		if !p.isLeader() {
793			return nil
794		}
795	
796		gatewayNSName := client.ObjectKeyFromObject(gateway.Source)
797		if updated := p.store.registerResourceInGatewayConfig(gatewayNSName, gateway); !updated {
798			return nil
799		}
800	
801		if gateway.Valid && len(gateway.Listeners) > 0 {
802			objects, err := p.buildNginxResourceObjects(
803				resourceName,
804				gateway.Source,
805				gateway.EffectiveNginxProxy,
806				gateway.Listeners,
807			)
808			if err != nil {
809				p.cfg.Logger.Error(err, "error building some nginx resources")
810			}
811	
812			// If NGINX deployment type switched between Deployment and DaemonSet, clean up the old one.
813			// If HPA was disabled, remove it.
814			nginxResources := p.store.getNginxResourcesForGateway(gatewayNSName)
815			if nginxResources != nil {
816				p.handleObjectDeletion(ctx, nginxResources)
817			}
818	
819			if err := p.provisionNginx(ctx, resourceName, gateway.Source, objects); err != nil {
820				return fmt.Errorf("error provisioning nginx resources: %w", err)
821			}
822		} else {
823			if err := p.deprovisionNginxForInvalidGateway(ctx, gatewayNSName); err != nil {
824				return fmt.Errorf("error deprovisioning nginx resources: %w", err)
825			}
826		}
827	
828		return nil
829	}
830	
831	func (p *NginxProvisioner) handleObjectDeletion(ctx context.Context, nginxResources *NginxResources) {
832		if needToDeleteDaemonSet(nginxResources) {
833			if err := p.deleteObject(ctx, &appsv1.DaemonSet{ObjectMeta: nginxResources.DaemonSet}); err != nil {
834				p.cfg.Logger.Error(err, "error deleting nginx resource")
835			}
836		} else if needToDeleteDeployment(nginxResources) {
837			if err := p.deleteObject(ctx, &appsv1.Deployment{ObjectMeta: nginxResources.Deployment}); err != nil {
838				p.cfg.Logger.Error(err, "error deleting nginx resource")
839			}
840		}
841	
842		if needToDeleteHPA(nginxResources) {
843			if err := p.deleteObject(ctx, &autoscalingv2.HorizontalPodAutoscaler{ObjectMeta: nginxResources.HPA}); err != nil {
844				p.cfg.Logger.Error(err, "error deleting nginx resource")
845			}
846		}
847	
848		if needToDeletePDB(nginxResources) {
849			if err := p.deleteObject(ctx, &policyv1.PodDisruptionBudget{ObjectMeta: nginxResources.PDB}); err != nil {
850				p.cfg.Logger.Error(err, "error deleting nginx resource")
851			}
852		}
853	}
854	
855	func needToDeleteDeployment(cfg *NginxResources) bool {
856		if cfg.Deployment.Name != "" {
857			if cfg.Gateway != nil && cfg.Gateway.EffectiveNginxProxy != nil &&
858				cfg.Gateway.EffectiveNginxProxy.Kubernetes != nil &&
859				cfg.Gateway.EffectiveNginxProxy.Kubernetes.DaemonSet != nil {
860				return true
861			}
862		}
863	
864		return false
865	}
866	
867	func needToDeleteDaemonSet(cfg *NginxResources) bool {
868		if cfg.DaemonSet.Name != "" && cfg.Gateway != nil {
869			if cfg.Gateway.EffectiveNginxProxy != nil &&
870				cfg.Gateway.EffectiveNginxProxy.Kubernetes != nil &&
871				cfg.Gateway.EffectiveNginxProxy.Kubernetes.Deployment != nil {
872				return true
873			} else if cfg.Gateway.EffectiveNginxProxy == nil ||
874				cfg.Gateway.EffectiveNginxProxy.Kubernetes == nil ||
875				cfg.Gateway.EffectiveNginxProxy.Kubernetes.DaemonSet == nil {
876				return true
877			}
878		}
879	
880		return false
881	}
882	
883	// isLoadBalancerClassImmutabilityErr returns true when the error is a Kubernetes validation
884	// error for the spec.loadBalancerClass field, which is immutable once a Service is created.
885	func isLoadBalancerClassImmutabilityErr(err error) bool {
886		var statusErr *apierrors.StatusError
887		if !errors.As(err, &statusErr) {
888			return false
889		}
890		if statusErr.ErrStatus.Details == nil {
891			return false
892		}
893		for _, cause := range statusErr.ErrStatus.Details.Causes {
894			if cause.Field == "spec.loadBalancerClass" {
895				return true
896			}
897		}
898		return false
899	}
900	
901	// needToDeletePDB returns true if a PDB was previously created for this Gateway
902	// but is no longer configured in the NginxProxy spec, and therefore should be deleted.
903	func needToDeletePDB(cfg *NginxResources) bool {
904		if cfg.PDB.Name != "" && cfg.Gateway != nil {
905			if cfg.Gateway.EffectiveNginxProxy != nil &&
906				cfg.Gateway.EffectiveNginxProxy.Kubernetes != nil &&
907				(cfg.Gateway.EffectiveNginxProxy.Kubernetes.Deployment == nil ||
908					cfg.Gateway.EffectiveNginxProxy.Kubernetes.Deployment.PodDisruptionBudget == nil) {
909				return true
910			} else if cfg.Gateway.EffectiveNginxProxy == nil ||
911				cfg.Gateway.EffectiveNginxProxy.Kubernetes == nil {
912				return true
913			}
914		}
915	
916		return false
917	}
918	
919	// needToDeleteHPA returns true if an HPA was previously created for this Gateway
920	// but is no longer configured in the NginxProxy spec, and therefore should be deleted.
921	func needToDeleteHPA(cfg *NginxResources) bool {
922		if cfg.HPA.Name != "" && cfg.Gateway != nil {
923			if cfg.Gateway.EffectiveNginxProxy != nil &&
924				cfg.Gateway.EffectiveNginxProxy.Kubernetes != nil &&
925				!isAutoscalingEnabled(cfg.Gateway.EffectiveNginxProxy.Kubernetes.Deployment) {
926				return true
927			} else if cfg.Gateway.EffectiveNginxProxy == nil ||
928				cfg.Gateway.EffectiveNginxProxy.Kubernetes == nil {
929				return true
930			}
931		}
932	
933		return false
934	}

69		Port     int32

74	// setOwnerReference is a helper to set owner reference on an object.
75	func (p *NginxProvisioner) setOwnerReference(obj client.Object, gateway *gatewayv1.Gateway) error {
76		return controllerutil.SetControllerReference(gateway, obj, p.k8sClient.Scheme())
77	}
78	
79	// resourceNames holds all the generated resource names.
80	type resourceNames struct {
81		// new name -> original name
82		dockerSecrets          map[string]string
83		nginxIncludesConfigMap string
84		nginxAgentConfigMap    string
85		agentTLS               string
86		jwt                    string
87		ca                     string
88		clientSSL              string
89		dataplaneKey           string
90	}

92	// buildNginxResourceObjects builds all the NGINX resource objects for a given Gateway and EffectiveNginxProxy.
93	// The allListeners parameter must include all listeners from both the Gateway and any attached ListenerSets;
94	// these are used to determine which ports the Service and container should expose.
95	func (p *NginxProvisioner) buildNginxResourceObjects(
96		resourceName string,
97		gateway *gatewayv1.Gateway,
98		nProxyCfg *graph.EffectiveNginxProxy,
99		allListeners []*graph.Listener,
100	) ([]client.Object, error) {
101		// NOTE: When adding new fields to the generated objects, please ensure to update the corresponding spec
102		// setter function in setter.go to set the new fields when updating the object.
103	
104		var errs []error
105	
106		// Need to ensure nginx resource objects are generated deterministically. Specifically when generating
107		// an object's field by ranging over a map, since ranging over a map is done in random order, we need to
108		// do some processing to ensure the generated results are the same each time.
109	
110		// build resource names
111		resourceNames := p.buildResourceNames(resourceName)
112	
113		// build labels, annotations, and objectMeta
114		selectorLabels, labels, annotations := p.buildLabelsAndAnnotations(resourceName, gateway)
115		objectMeta := metav1.ObjectMeta{
116			Name:        resourceName,
117			Namespace:   gateway.GetNamespace(),
118			Labels:      labels,
119			Annotations: annotations,
120		}
121	
122		// build secrets
123		secretsList, secretsErr := p.buildNginxSecrets(
124			objectMeta,
125			resourceNames,
126			gateway,
127		)
128		if secretsErr != nil {
129			errs = append(errs, secretsErr)
130		}
131	
132		configmapsList, configMapErrs := p.buildNginxConfigMaps(
133			objectMeta,
134			nProxyCfg,
135			resourceNames,
136			gateway,
137		)
138		if configMapErrs != nil {
139			errs = append(errs, configMapErrs...)
140		}
141	
142		// build service account
143		serviceAccount, err := p.buildServiceAccount(objectMeta, gateway)
144		if err != nil {
145			errs = append(errs, err)
146		}
147	
148		var openshiftObjs []client.Object
149		if p.isOpenshift {
150			var openShiftErrs []error
151			openshiftObjs, openShiftErrs = p.buildOpenshiftObjects(objectMeta, gateway)
152			if openShiftErrs != nil {
153				errs = append(errs, openShiftErrs...)
154			}
155		}
156	
157		// build ports from all listeners (Gateway + ListenerSets)
158		ports := p.buildPortsFromListeners(allListeners)
159	
160		// Add healthcheck port to service if expose is enabled
161		var healthcheckPort int32
162		if isNginxReadinessProbeExposed(nProxyCfg) {
163			healthcheckPort = dataplane.GetNginxReadinessProbePort(nProxyCfg)
164			ports = appendUniquePortProtoEntry(ports, portProtoEntry{Port: healthcheckPort, Protocol: corev1.ProtocolTCP})
165		}
166	
167		service, err := p.buildNginxService(
168			cloneObjectMeta(objectMeta),
169			nProxyCfg,
170			ports,
171			healthcheckPort,
172			selectorLabels,
173			gateway.Spec.Addresses,
174		)
175		if err != nil {
176			errs = append(errs, err)
177		}
178		if err := p.setOwnerReference(service, gateway); err != nil {
179			errs = append(errs, fmt.Errorf("failed to set owner reference on Service %s: %w", service.GetName(), err))
180		}
181	
182		// build deployment/daemonset
183		deployment, err := p.buildNginxDeployment(
184			cloneObjectMeta(objectMeta),
185			nProxyCfg,
186			ports,
187			selectorLabels,
188			resourceNames,
189		)
190		if err != nil {
191			errs = append(errs, err)
192		}
193		if err := p.setOwnerReference(deployment, gateway); err != nil {
194			errs = append(errs, fmt.Errorf(
195				"failed to set owner reference on %s %s: %w",
196				deployment.GetObjectKind().GroupVersionKind().Kind,
197				deployment.GetName(),
198				err,
199			))
200		}
201	
202		// order to install resources:
203		// secrets
204		// configmaps
205		// serviceaccount
206		// role/binding (if openshift)
207		// service
208		// deployment/daemonset
209		// hpa
210		// pdb
211	
212		objects := make([]client.Object, 0, len(configmapsList)+len(secretsList)+len(openshiftObjs)+3)
213		objects = append(objects, secretsList...)
214		objects = append(objects, configmapsList...)
215		objects = append(objects, serviceAccount)
216		if p.isOpenshift {
217			objects = append(objects, openshiftObjs...)
218		}
219	
220		objects = append(objects, service, deployment)
221	
222		objects, errs = p.buildHPAAndPDB(objectMeta, nProxyCfg, selectorLabels, gateway, objects, errs)
223	
224		return objects, errors.Join(errs...)
225	}
226	
227	// buildHPAAndPDB builds the HPA and PDB for the NGINX deployment
228	// if they are enabled in the EffectiveNginxProxy configuration.
229	func (p *NginxProvisioner) buildHPAAndPDB(
230		objectMeta metav1.ObjectMeta,
231		nProxyCfg *graph.EffectiveNginxProxy,
232		selectorLabels map[string]string,
233		gateway *gatewayv1.Gateway,
234		objects []client.Object,
235		errs []error,
236	) ([]client.Object, []error) {
237		if hpa := p.buildHPA(objectMeta, nProxyCfg); hpa != nil {
238			if err := p.setOwnerReference(hpa, gateway); err != nil {
239				errs = append(errs, fmt.Errorf("failed to set owner reference on HPA %s: %w", hpa.GetName(), err))
240			}
241			objects = append(objects, hpa)
242		}
243	
244		if pdb := p.buildPDB(objectMeta, nProxyCfg, selectorLabels); pdb != nil {
245			if err := p.setOwnerReference(pdb, gateway); err != nil {
246				errs = append(errs, fmt.Errorf("failed to set owner reference on pod disruption budget %s: %w", pdb.GetName(), err))
247			}
248			objects = append(objects, pdb)
249		}
250	
251		return objects, errs
252	}
253	
254	// buildResourceNames builds all the resource names for a given gateway resource name.
255	func (p *NginxProvisioner) buildResourceNames(resourceName string) resourceNames {
256		names := resourceNames{
257			nginxIncludesConfigMap: controller.CreateNginxResourceName(resourceName, nginxIncludesConfigMapNameSuffix),
258			nginxAgentConfigMap:    controller.CreateNginxResourceName(resourceName, nginxAgentConfigMapNameSuffix),
259			agentTLS:               controller.CreateNginxResourceName(resourceName, p.cfg.AgentTLSSecretName),
260			dockerSecrets:          make(map[string]string),
261		}
262	
263		if p.cfg.Plus {
264			names.jwt = controller.CreateNginxResourceName(resourceName, p.cfg.PlusUsageConfig.SecretName)
265			if p.cfg.PlusUsageConfig.CASecretName != "" {
266				names.ca = controller.CreateNginxResourceName(resourceName, p.cfg.PlusUsageConfig.CASecretName)
267			}
268			if p.cfg.PlusUsageConfig.ClientSSLSecretName != "" {
269				names.clientSSL = controller.CreateNginxResourceName(resourceName, p.cfg.PlusUsageConfig.ClientSSLSecretName)
270			}
271		}
272	
273		if p.cfg.NginxOneConsoleTelemetryConfig.DataplaneKeySecretName != "" {
274			names.dataplaneKey = controller.CreateNginxResourceName(
275				resourceName,
276				p.cfg.NginxOneConsoleTelemetryConfig.DataplaneKeySecretName,
277			)
278		}
279	
280		for _, name := range p.cfg.NginxDockerSecretNames {
281			newName := controller.CreateNginxResourceName(resourceName, name)
282			names.dockerSecrets[newName] = name
283		}
284	
285		return names
286	}
287	
288	// buildLabelsAndAnnotations builds labels and annotations for NGINX resources.
289	func (p *NginxProvisioner) buildLabelsAndAnnotations(
290		resourceName string,
291		gateway *gatewayv1.Gateway,
292	) (selectorLabels, labels, annotations map[string]string) {
293		selectorLabels = make(map[string]string)
294		maps.Copy(selectorLabels, p.baseLabelSelector.MatchLabels)
295		selectorLabels[controller.AppNameLabel] = resourceName
296	
297		annotations = make(map[string]string)
298		if len(gateway.GetName()) > controller.MaxServiceNameLen {
299			annotations[controller.GatewayLabel] = gateway.GetName()
300		} else {
301			selectorLabels[controller.GatewayLabel] = gateway.GetName()
302		}
303	
304		labels = make(map[string]string)
305		maps.Copy(labels, selectorLabels)
306	
307		if gateway.Spec.Infrastructure != nil {
308			for key, value := range gateway.Spec.Infrastructure.Labels {
309				labels[string(key)] = string(value)
310			}
311			for key, value := range gateway.Spec.Infrastructure.Annotations {
312				annotations[string(key)] = string(value)
313			}
314		}
315	
316		return selectorLabels, labels, annotations
317	}
318	
319	// buildServiceAccount builds the ServiceAccount for NGINX deployment/daemonset.
320	func (p *NginxProvisioner) buildServiceAccount(
321		objectMeta metav1.ObjectMeta,
322		gateway *gatewayv1.Gateway,
323	) (*corev1.ServiceAccount, error) {
324		serviceAccount := &corev1.ServiceAccount{
325			ObjectMeta:                   objectMeta,
326			AutomountServiceAccountToken: helpers.GetPointer(false),
327		}
328		if err := p.setOwnerReference(serviceAccount, gateway); err != nil {
329			return serviceAccount, fmt.Errorf(
330				"failed to set owner reference on ServiceAccount %s: %w", serviceAccount.GetName(),
331				err,
332			)
333		}
334		return serviceAccount, nil
335	}
336	
337	// buildPortsFromListeners builds a list of port/protocol entries from the graph listeners.
338	// This includes listeners from both the Gateway and any attached ListenerSets.
339	// A port number can appear multiple times if it has different protocols (e.g., TCP and UDP on port 53).
340	func (p *NginxProvisioner) buildPortsFromListeners(listeners []*graph.Listener) []portProtoEntry {
341		seen := make(map[portProtoEntry]struct{}, len(listeners))
342		ports := make([]portProtoEntry, 0, len(listeners))
343		for _, listener := range listeners {
344			var protocol corev1.Protocol
345			switch listener.Source.Protocol {
346			case gatewayv1.UDPProtocolType:
347				protocol = corev1.ProtocolUDP
348			default:
349				protocol = corev1.ProtocolTCP
350			}
351			entry := portProtoEntry{Port: listener.Source.Port, Protocol: protocol}
352			if _, exists := seen[entry]; !exists {
353				seen[entry] = struct{}{}
354				ports = append(ports, entry)
355			}
356		}
357		return ports
358	}
359	
360	// appendUniquePortProtoEntry appends the entry to ports only if an identical port+protocol does not already exist.
361	func appendUniquePortProtoEntry(ports []portProtoEntry, entry portProtoEntry) []portProtoEntry {
362		for _, p := range ports {
363			if p.Port == entry.Port && p.Protocol == entry.Protocol {
364				return ports
365			}
366		}
367		return append(ports, entry)
368	}

419	func (p *NginxProvisioner) buildNginxSecrets(
420		objectMeta metav1.ObjectMeta,
421		names resourceNames,
422		gateway *gatewayv1.Gateway,
423	) ([]client.Object, error) {
424		var secretsList []client.Object
425		var dockerSecrets []client.Object
426		var errs []error
427	
428		addSecret := func(
429			sourceSecretName string,
430			targetSecretName string,
431			secretType corev1.SecretType,
432		) *corev1.Secret {
433			if targetSecretName == "" {
434				return nil
435			}
436			newSecret, err := p.getAndUpdateSecret(
437				sourceSecretName,
438				metav1.ObjectMeta{
439					Name:        targetSecretName,
440					Namespace:   objectMeta.Namespace,
441					Labels:      objectMeta.Labels,
442					Annotations: objectMeta.Annotations,
443				},
444				secretType,
445			)
446			if err != nil {
447				errs = append(errs, err)
448				return nil
449			}
450			if err := p.setOwnerReference(newSecret, gateway); err != nil {
451				errs = append(errs, fmt.Errorf("failed to set owner reference on Secret %s: %w", newSecret.GetName(), err))
452				return nil
453			}
454			return newSecret
455		}
456	
457		// agent TLS Secret
458		if secret := addSecret(p.cfg.AgentTLSSecretName, names.agentTLS, corev1.SecretTypeTLS); secret != nil {
459			secretsList = append(secretsList, secret)
460		}
461	
462		// docker Secrets
463		for targetSecretName, sourceSecretName := range names.dockerSecrets {
464			if secret := addSecret(sourceSecretName, targetSecretName, corev1.SecretTypeDockerConfigJson); secret != nil {
465				dockerSecrets = append(dockerSecrets, secret)
466			}
467		}
468	
469		// need to sort secrets so everytime buildNginxSecrets is called it will generate the exact same
470		// array of secrets. This is needed to satisfy deterministic results of the method.
471		sort.Slice(dockerSecrets, func(i, j int) bool {
472			return dockerSecrets[i].GetName() < dockerSecrets[j].GetName()
473		})
474		secretsList = append(secretsList, dockerSecrets...)
475	
476		// plus Secrets (in order: jwt, ca, clientSSL)
477		if p.cfg.PlusUsageConfig != nil {
478			if secret := addSecret(p.cfg.PlusUsageConfig.SecretName, names.jwt, corev1.SecretTypeOpaque); secret != nil {
479				secretsList = append(secretsList, secret)
480			}
481			if secret := addSecret(p.cfg.PlusUsageConfig.CASecretName, names.ca, corev1.SecretTypeOpaque); secret != nil {
482				secretsList = append(secretsList, secret)
483			}
484			if secret := addSecret(
485				p.cfg.PlusUsageConfig.ClientSSLSecretName,
486				names.clientSSL,
487				corev1.SecretTypeTLS,
488			); secret != nil {
489				secretsList = append(secretsList, secret)
490			}
491		}
492	
493		// Dataplane Key Secret
494		if secret := addSecret(
495			p.cfg.NginxOneConsoleTelemetryConfig.DataplaneKeySecretName,
496			names.dataplaneKey,
497			corev1.SecretTypeOpaque,
498		); secret != nil {
499			secretsList = append(secretsList, secret)
500		}
501	
502		return secretsList, errors.Join(errs...)
503	}
504	
505	func (p *NginxProvisioner) getAndUpdateSecret(
506		name string,
507		newObjectMeta metav1.ObjectMeta,
508		secretType corev1.SecretType,
509	) (*corev1.Secret, error) {
510		ctx, cancel := context.WithTimeout(context.Background(), 10*time.Second)
511		defer cancel()
512	
513		key := types.NamespacedName{Namespace: p.cfg.GatewayPodConfig.Namespace, Name: name}
514		secret := &corev1.Secret{}
515		if err := p.k8sClient.Get(ctx, key, secret); err != nil {
516			return nil, fmt.Errorf("error getting secret: %w", err)
517		}
518	
519		newSecret := &corev1.Secret{
520			ObjectMeta: newObjectMeta,
521			Data:       secret.Data,
522			Type:       secretType,
523		}
524	
525		return newSecret, nil
526	}

528	func (p *NginxProvisioner) buildNginxConfigMaps(
529		objectMeta metav1.ObjectMeta,
530		nProxyCfg *graph.EffectiveNginxProxy,
531		names resourceNames,
532		gateway *gatewayv1.Gateway,
533	) ([]client.Object, []error) {
534		var errs []error
535	
536		bootstrapCM := p.buildBootstrapConfigMap(
537			objectMeta,
538			nProxyCfg,
539			names.nginxIncludesConfigMap,
540			names.ca != "",
541			names.clientSSL != "",
542		)
543		if err := p.setOwnerReference(bootstrapCM, gateway); err != nil {
544			errs = append(errs, fmt.Errorf("failed to set owner reference on ConfigMap %s: %w", bootstrapCM.GetName(), err))
545		}
546	
547		agentCM := p.buildAgentConfigMap(objectMeta, nProxyCfg, names.nginxAgentConfigMap)
548		if err := p.setOwnerReference(agentCM, gateway); err != nil {
549			errs = append(errs, fmt.Errorf("failed to set owner reference on ConfigMap %s: %w", agentCM.GetName(), err))
550		}
551	
552		return []client.Object{bootstrapCM, agentCM}, errs
553	}

555	func (p *NginxProvisioner) buildBootstrapConfigMap(
556		objectMeta metav1.ObjectMeta,
557		nProxyCfg *graph.EffectiveNginxProxy,
558		name string,
559		caSecret bool,
560		clientSSLSecret bool,
561	) *corev1.ConfigMap {
562		logLevel := defaultNginxErrorLogLevel
563		if nProxyCfg != nil && nProxyCfg.Logging != nil && nProxyCfg.Logging.ErrorLevel != nil {
564			logLevel = string(*nProxyCfg.Logging.ErrorLevel)
565		}
566	
567		workerConnections := dataplane.DefaultWorkerConnections
568		if nProxyCfg != nil && nProxyCfg.WorkerConnections != nil {
569			workerConnections = *nProxyCfg.WorkerConnections
570		}
571	
572		mainFields := map[string]any{
573			"ErrorLevel":        logLevel,
574			"WorkerConnections": workerConnections,
575		}
576	
577		eventsFields := map[string]any{
578			"WorkerConnections": workerConnections,
579		}
580	
581		cm := &corev1.ConfigMap{
582			ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{
583				Name:        name,
584				Namespace:   objectMeta.Namespace,
585				Labels:      objectMeta.Labels,
586				Annotations: objectMeta.Annotations,
587			},
588			Data: map[string]string{
589				configmaps.MainConfKey:   string(helpers.MustExecuteTemplate(mainTemplate, mainFields)),
590				configmaps.EventsConfKey: string(helpers.MustExecuteTemplate(eventsTemplate, eventsFields)),
591			},
592		}
593	
594		if p.cfg.Plus {
595			mgmtFields := map[string]any{
596				"UsageEndpoint":        p.cfg.PlusUsageConfig.Endpoint,
597				"SkipVerify":           p.cfg.PlusUsageConfig.SkipVerify,
598				"UsageCASecret":        caSecret,
599				"UsageClientSSLSecret": clientSSLSecret,
600			}
601			cm.Data[configmaps.MgmtConfKey] = string(helpers.MustExecuteTemplate(mgmtTemplate, mgmtFields))
602		}
603	
604		return cm
605	}

607	func (p *NginxProvisioner) buildAgentConfigMap(
608		objectMeta metav1.ObjectMeta,
609		nProxyCfg *graph.EffectiveNginxProxy,
610		name string,
611	) *corev1.ConfigMap {
612		metricsPort := config.DefaultNginxMetricsPort
613		port, enableMetrics := graph.MetricsEnabledForNginxProxy(nProxyCfg)
614		if port != nil {
615			metricsPort = *port
616		}
617	
618		depType := nginxTypes.DeploymentType
619		if nProxyCfg != nil && nProxyCfg.Kubernetes != nil && nProxyCfg.Kubernetes.DaemonSet != nil {
620			depType = nginxTypes.DaemonSetType
621		}
622	
623		agentLabels := maps.Clone(p.cfg.AgentLabels)
624		if agentLabels == nil {
625			agentLabels = make(map[string]string)
626		}
627		agentLabels[nginxTypes.AgentOwnerNameLabel] = fmt.Sprintf("%s_%s", objectMeta.Namespace, objectMeta.Name)
628		agentLabels[nginxTypes.AgentOwnerTypeLabel] = depType
629	
630		agentFields := map[string]any{
631			"Plus":            p.cfg.Plus,
632			"ServiceName":     p.cfg.GatewayPodConfig.ServiceName,
633			"Namespace":       p.cfg.GatewayPodConfig.Namespace,
634			"ServerTLSDomain": p.cfg.ServerTLSDomain,
635			"EnableMetrics":   enableMetrics,
636			"MetricsPort":     metricsPort,
637			"AgentLabels":     agentLabels,
638		}
639	
640		if nProxyCfg != nil {
641			if graph.WAFEnabledForNginxProxy(nProxyCfg) {
642				agentFields["WafEnabled"] = true
643			}
644	
645			if nProxyCfg.Logging != nil && nProxyCfg.Logging.AgentLevel != nil {
646				agentFields["LogLevel"] = *nProxyCfg.Logging.AgentLevel
647			}
648		}
649	
650		if p.cfg.NginxOneConsoleTelemetryConfig.DataplaneKeySecretName != "" {
651			agentFields["NginxOneReporting"] = true
652			agentFields["EndpointHost"] = p.cfg.NginxOneConsoleTelemetryConfig.EndpointHost
653			agentFields["EndpointPort"] = strconv.Itoa(p.cfg.NginxOneConsoleTelemetryConfig.EndpointPort)
654			agentFields["EndpointTLSSkipVerify"] = p.cfg.NginxOneConsoleTelemetryConfig.EndpointTLSSkipVerify
655		}
656	
657		return &corev1.ConfigMap{
658			ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{
659				Name:        name,
660				Namespace:   objectMeta.Namespace,
661				Labels:      objectMeta.Labels,
662				Annotations: objectMeta.Annotations,
663			},
664			Data: map[string]string{
665				configmaps.AgentConfKey: string(helpers.MustExecuteTemplate(agentTemplate, agentFields)),
666			},
667		}
668	}

679					APIGroups:     []string{"security.openshift.io"},
680					ResourceNames: []string{p.cfg.NGINXSCCName},
681					Resources:     []string{"securitycontextconstraints"},
682					Verbs:         []string{"use"},
683				},
684			},
685		}
686	
687		if err := p.setOwnerReference(role, gateway); err != nil {
688			errs = append(errs, fmt.Errorf("failed to set owner reference on Role %s: %w", role.GetName(), err))
689		}
690	
691		roleBinding := &rbacv1.RoleBinding{
692			ObjectMeta: objectMeta,
693			RoleRef: rbacv1.RoleRef{
694				APIGroup: "rbac.authorization.k8s.io",
695				Kind:     "Role",
696				Name:     objectMeta.Name,
697			},
698			Subjects: []rbacv1.Subject{
699				{
700					Kind:      rbacv1.ServiceAccountKind,
701					Name:      objectMeta.Name,
702					Namespace: objectMeta.Namespace,
703				},

708			errs = append(errs, fmt.Errorf("failed to set owner reference on RoleBinding %s: %w", roleBinding.GetName(), err))
709		}

714	func (p *NginxProvisioner) buildNginxService(
715		objectMeta metav1.ObjectMeta,
716		nProxyCfg *graph.EffectiveNginxProxy,
717		ports []portProtoEntry,
718		healthcheckPort int32,
719		selectorLabels map[string]string,
720		addresses []gatewayv1.GatewaySpecAddress,
721	) (*corev1.Service, error) {
722		var serviceCfg ngfAPIv1alpha2.ServiceSpec
723		if nProxyCfg != nil && nProxyCfg.Kubernetes != nil && nProxyCfg.Kubernetes.Service != nil {
724			serviceCfg = *nProxyCfg.Kubernetes.Service
725		}
726	
727		serviceType := defaultServiceType
728		if serviceCfg.ServiceType != nil {
729			serviceType = corev1.ServiceType(*serviceCfg.ServiceType)
730		}
731	
732		var externalIPs []string
733		for _, addr := range addresses {
734			if addr.Type != nil && *addr.Type == gatewayv1.IPAddressType && net.ParseIP(addr.Value) != nil {
735				externalIPs = append(externalIPs, addr.Value)
736			}
737		}
738	
739		var servicePolicy corev1.ServiceExternalTrafficPolicy
740		if serviceType != corev1.ServiceTypeClusterIP {
741			servicePolicy = defaultServicePolicy
742			if serviceCfg.ExternalTrafficPolicy != nil {
743				servicePolicy = corev1.ServiceExternalTrafficPolicy(*serviceCfg.ExternalTrafficPolicy)
744			}
745		}
746	
747		servicePorts := buildServicePorts(ports, healthcheckPort, serviceType, serviceCfg.NodePorts)
748	
749		svc := &corev1.Service{
750			ObjectMeta: objectMeta,
751			Spec: corev1.ServiceSpec{
752				Type:                  serviceType,
753				Ports:                 servicePorts,
754				ExternalTrafficPolicy: servicePolicy,
755				Selector:              selectorLabels,
756				IPFamilyPolicy:        helpers.GetPointer(corev1.IPFamilyPolicyPreferDualStack),
757			},
758		}
759	
760		setIPFamily(nProxyCfg, svc)
761	
762		setSvcLoadBalancerSettings(serviceCfg, &svc.Spec)
763	
764		// Apply service patches before the LoadBalancerClass check so that a patch-provided
765		// class is visible when we decide whether to set our own.
766		if nProxyCfg != nil && nProxyCfg.Kubernetes != nil && nProxyCfg.Kubernetes.Service != nil {
767			if err := applyPatches(svc, nProxyCfg.Kubernetes.Service.Patches); err != nil {
768				return svc, fmt.Errorf("failed to apply service patches: %w", err)
769			}
770		}
771	
772		p.updateLoadBalancerClass(svc, externalIPs)
773	
774		return svc, nil
775	}
776	
777	// updateLoadBalancerClass sets the Service's LoadBalancerClass to this controller
778	// if the Gateway has IP addresses and the Service is a LoadBalancer.
779	func (p *NginxProvisioner) updateLoadBalancerClass(
780		svc *corev1.Service,
781		gwExternalIPs []string,
782	) {
783		if svc.Spec.Type == corev1.ServiceTypeLoadBalancer && len(gwExternalIPs) > 0 {
784			ctlr := p.cfg.GatewayCtlrName
785			svc.Spec.LoadBalancerClass = &ctlr
786		}
787	}
788	
789	func buildServicePorts(
790		ports []portProtoEntry,
791		healthcheckPort int32,
792		serviceType corev1.ServiceType,
793		nodePorts []ngfAPIv1alpha2.NodePort,
794	) []corev1.ServicePort {
795		// Determine which port numbers have multiple protocols (e.g., TCP and UDP on the same port).
796		protocolsPerPort := make(map[int32]int)
797		for _, entry := range ports {
798			protocolsPerPort[entry.Port]++
799		}
800	
801		servicePorts := make([]corev1.ServicePort, 0, len(ports))
802		for _, entry := range ports {
803			name := fmt.Sprintf("port-%d", entry.Port)
804			if protocolsPerPort[entry.Port] > 1 {
805				name = fmt.Sprintf("port-%d-%s", entry.Port, strings.ToLower(string(entry.Protocol)))
806			}
807			if healthcheckPort > 0 && entry.Port == healthcheckPort && entry.Protocol == corev1.ProtocolTCP {
808				name = "health"
809			}
810			servicePort := corev1.ServicePort{
811				Name:       name,
812				Port:       entry.Port,
813				TargetPort: intstr.FromInt32(entry.Port),
814				Protocol:   entry.Protocol,
815			}
816	
817			if serviceType != corev1.ServiceTypeClusterIP {
818				for _, nodePort := range nodePorts {
819					if nodePort.ListenerPort == entry.Port {
820						servicePort.NodePort = nodePort.Port
821					}
822				}
823			}
824	
825			servicePorts = append(servicePorts, servicePort)
826		}
827	
828		// need to sort ports so everytime buildNginxService is called it will generate the exact same
829		// array of ports. This is needed to satisfy deterministic results of the method.
830		sort.Slice(servicePorts, func(i, j int) bool {
831			if servicePorts[i].Port != servicePorts[j].Port {
832				return servicePorts[i].Port < servicePorts[j].Port
833			}
834			return servicePorts[i].Protocol < servicePorts[j].Protocol
835		})
836	
837		return servicePorts
838	}
839	
840	func setIPFamily(nProxyCfg *graph.EffectiveNginxProxy, svc *corev1.Service) {
841		if nProxyCfg != nil && nProxyCfg.IPFamily != nil && *nProxyCfg.IPFamily != ngfAPIv1alpha2.Dual {
842			svc.Spec.IPFamilyPolicy = helpers.GetPointer(corev1.IPFamilyPolicySingleStack)
843			if *nProxyCfg.IPFamily == ngfAPIv1alpha2.IPv4 {
844				svc.Spec.IPFamilies = []corev1.IPFamily{corev1.IPv4Protocol}
845			} else {
846				svc.Spec.IPFamilies = []corev1.IPFamily{corev1.IPv6Protocol}
847			}
848		}
849	}
850	
851	func setSvcLoadBalancerSettings(svcCfg ngfAPIv1alpha2.ServiceSpec, svcSpec *corev1.ServiceSpec) {
852		if svcCfg.LoadBalancerIP != nil {
853			svcSpec.LoadBalancerIP = *svcCfg.LoadBalancerIP
854		}
855		if svcCfg.LoadBalancerClass != nil {
856			svcSpec.LoadBalancerClass = svcCfg.LoadBalancerClass
857		}
858		if svcCfg.LoadBalancerSourceRanges != nil {
859			svcSpec.LoadBalancerSourceRanges = svcCfg.LoadBalancerSourceRanges
860		}
861	}
862	
863	func (p *NginxProvisioner) buildNginxDeployment(
864		objectMeta metav1.ObjectMeta,
865		nProxyCfg *graph.EffectiveNginxProxy,
866		ports []portProtoEntry,
867		selectorLabels map[string]string,
868		names resourceNames,
869	) (client.Object, error) {
870		podTemplateSpec := p.buildNginxPodTemplateSpec(
871			objectMeta,
872			nProxyCfg,
873			ports,
874			names,
875		)
876	
877		if nProxyCfg != nil && nProxyCfg.Kubernetes != nil && nProxyCfg.Kubernetes.DaemonSet != nil {
878			daemonSet := &appsv1.DaemonSet{
879				ObjectMeta: objectMeta,
880				Spec: appsv1.DaemonSetSpec{
881					Selector: &metav1.LabelSelector{
882						MatchLabels: selectorLabels,
883					},
884					Template: podTemplateSpec,
885				},
886			}
887	
888			// Apply DaemonSet patches
889			if err := applyPatches(daemonSet, nProxyCfg.Kubernetes.DaemonSet.Patches); err != nil {
890				return daemonSet, fmt.Errorf("failed to apply daemonset patches: %w", err)
891			}
892	
893			return daemonSet, nil
894		}
895	
896		deployment := &appsv1.Deployment{
897			ObjectMeta: objectMeta,
898			Spec: appsv1.DeploymentSpec{
899				Selector: &metav1.LabelSelector{
900					MatchLabels: selectorLabels,
901				},
902				Template: podTemplateSpec,
903			},
904		}
905	
906		var deploymentCfg ngfAPIv1alpha2.DeploymentSpec
907		if nProxyCfg != nil && nProxyCfg.Kubernetes != nil && nProxyCfg.Kubernetes.Deployment != nil {
908			deploymentCfg = *nProxyCfg.Kubernetes.Deployment
909			// Apply Deployment patches
910			if err := applyPatches(deployment, nProxyCfg.Kubernetes.Deployment.Patches); err != nil {
911				return deployment, fmt.Errorf("failed to apply deployment patches: %w", err)
912			}
913		}
914	
915		// Determine replica count based on HPA status
916		replicas := p.determineReplicas(objectMeta, deploymentCfg)
917		if replicas != nil {
918			deployment.Spec.Replicas = replicas
919		}
920	
921		return deployment, nil
922	}
923	
924	// determineReplicas determines the appropriate replica count for a deployment based on HPA status.
925	//
926	// HPA Replicas Management Strategy:
927	//
928	// When an HPA is managing a deployment, we must read the current deployment's replicas
929	// from the cluster and use that value, rather than trying to set our own value or read
930	// from HPA.Status.DesiredReplicas (which is eventually consistent and stale).
931	//
932	// Why we can't use HPA.Status.DesiredReplicas:
933	// - HPA.Status updates lag behind Deployment.Spec.Replicas changes
934	// - When HPA scales down: HPA writes Deployment.Spec → then updates its own Status
935	// - If we read Status during this window, we get the OLD value and overwrite HPA's new value
936	// - This creates a race condition causing pod churn
937	//
938	// Our approach:
939	// - When HPA exists: Read current deployment replicas from cluster and use that
940	// - When HPA doesn't exist yet: Set replicas for initial deployment creation
941	// - When HPA exists but Deployment doesn't exist yet: Set replicas for initial deployment creation
942	// - When HPA is disabled: Set replicas normally.
943	func (p *NginxProvisioner) determineReplicas(
944		objectMeta metav1.ObjectMeta,
945		deploymentCfg ngfAPIv1alpha2.DeploymentSpec,
946	) *int32 {
947		replicas := deploymentCfg.Replicas
948	
949		if !isAutoscalingEnabled(&deploymentCfg) {
950			return replicas
951		}
952	
953		ctx, cancel := context.WithTimeout(context.Background(), 5*time.Second)
954		defer cancel()
955	
956		hpa := &autoscalingv2.HorizontalPodAutoscaler{}
957		err := p.k8sClient.Get(ctx, types.NamespacedName{
958			Namespace: objectMeta.Namespace,
959			Name:      objectMeta.Name,
960		}, hpa)
961		if err != nil {
962			return replicas
963		}
964	
965		existingDeployment := &appsv1.Deployment{}
966		err = p.k8sClient.Get(ctx, types.NamespacedName{
967			Namespace: objectMeta.Namespace,
968			Name:      objectMeta.Name,
969		}, existingDeployment)
970	
971		if err == nil && existingDeployment.Spec.Replicas != nil {
972			replicas = existingDeployment.Spec.Replicas
973		}
974	
975		return replicas
976	}
977	
978	// applyPatches applies the provided patches to the given object.
979	func applyPatches(obj client.Object, patches []ngfAPIv1alpha2.Patch) error {
980		if len(patches) == 0 {
981			return nil
982		}
983	
984		// Convert object to JSON
985		objData, err := json.Marshal(obj)
986		if err != nil {
987			return fmt.Errorf("failed to marshal object: %w", err)
988		}
989	
990		// Apply each patch in sequence
991		for i, patch := range patches {
992			if patch.Value == nil || len(patch.Value.Raw) == 0 {
993				continue
994			}
995			patchType := ngfAPIv1alpha2.PatchTypeStrategicMerge
996			if patch.Type != nil {
997				patchType = *patch.Type
998			}
999	
1000			patchData := patch.Value.Raw
1001			var patchedData []byte
1002	
1003			switch patchType {
1004			case ngfAPIv1alpha2.PatchTypeStrategicMerge:
1005				patchedData, err = strategicpatch.StrategicMergePatch(objData, patchData, obj)
1006				if err != nil {
1007					return fmt.Errorf("failed to apply %s patch %d: %w", patchType, i, err)
1008				}
1009			case ngfAPIv1alpha2.PatchTypeMerge:
1010				patchedData, err = jsonpatch.MergePatch(objData, patchData)
1011				if err != nil {
1012					return fmt.Errorf("failed to apply %s patch %d: %w", patchType, i, err)
1013				}
1014			case ngfAPIv1alpha2.PatchTypeJSONPatch:
1015				jsonPatch, err := jsonpatch.DecodePatch(patchData)
1016				if err != nil {
1017					return fmt.Errorf("failed to decode json patch %d: %w", i, err)
1018				}
1019				patchedData, err = jsonPatch.Apply(objData)
1020				if err != nil {
1021					return fmt.Errorf("failed to apply %s patch %d: %w", patchType, i, err)
1022				}
1023			default:
1024				return fmt.Errorf("unsupported patch type: %s", patchType)
1025			}
1026	
1027			objData = patchedData
1028		}
1029	
1030		// Unmarshal back to object
1031		if err := json.Unmarshal(objData, obj); err != nil {
1032			return fmt.Errorf("failed to unmarshal patched object: %w", err)
1033		}
1034	
1035		return nil
1036	}
1037	
1038	// buildNginxPodTemplateSpec builds the complete pod template spec.
1039	func (p *NginxProvisioner) buildNginxPodTemplateSpec(
1040		objectMeta metav1.ObjectMeta,
1041		nProxyCfg *graph.EffectiveNginxProxy,
1042		ports []portProtoEntry,
1043		names resourceNames,
1044	) corev1.PodTemplateSpec {
1045		// Build container ports and pod annotations
1046		containerPorts, podAnnotations := p.buildContainerPortsAndAnnotations(ports, nProxyCfg, objectMeta.Annotations)
1047	
1048		// Build NGINX container
1049		nginxContainer := p.buildNginxContainer(containerPorts, nProxyCfg)
1050	
1051		// Build base volumes
1052		volumes := p.buildBaseVolumes(names)
1053	
1054		// Build containers list
1055		containers := []corev1.Container{nginxContainer}
1056	
1057		// Configure WAF if enabled (requires NGINX Plus)
1058		if p.cfg.Plus && graph.WAFEnabledForNginxProxy(nProxyCfg) {
1059			containers, volumes = p.configureWAF(containers, volumes, nProxyCfg)
1060		}
1061	
1062		// Build init containers
1063		initContainers := p.buildInitContainers(nProxyCfg)
1064	
1065		// Create base pod template spec
1066		spec := p.buildBasePodTemplateSpec(objectMeta, podAnnotations, containers, initContainers, volumes)
1067	
1068		// Apply user configuration overrides
1069		p.applyUserConfiguration(&spec, nProxyCfg)
1070	
1071		// Configure image pull secrets
1072		p.configureImagePullSecrets(&spec, names)
1073	
1074		// Configure NGINX Plus if enabled
1075		if p.cfg.Plus {
1076			p.configureNginxPlus(&spec, names)
1077		}
1078	
1079		// Configure dataplane key secret for NGINX One Console telemetry
1080		if p.cfg.NginxOneConsoleTelemetryConfig.DataplaneKeySecretName != "" {
1081			p.configureDataplaneKeySecret(&spec, names)
1082		}
1083	
1084		// Configure inference extension if enabled
1085		if p.cfg.InferenceExtension {
1086			var containerResources corev1.ResourceRequirements
1087			if nProxyCfg != nil && nProxyCfg.Kubernetes != nil {
1088				var containerSpec *ngfAPIv1alpha2.ContainerSpec
1089				if nProxyCfg.Kubernetes.Deployment != nil {
1090					containerSpec = &nProxyCfg.Kubernetes.Deployment.Container
1091				} else if nProxyCfg.Kubernetes.DaemonSet != nil {
1092					containerSpec = &nProxyCfg.Kubernetes.DaemonSet.Container
1093				}
1094				if containerSpec != nil && containerSpec.Resources != nil {
1095					containerResources = *containerSpec.Resources
1096				}
1097			}
1098			p.configureInferenceExtension(&spec, containerResources)
1099		}
1100	
1101		return spec
1102	}
1103	
1104	// buildContainerPortsAndAnnotations builds container ports and pod annotations.
1105	func (p *NginxProvisioner) buildContainerPortsAndAnnotations(
1106		ports []portProtoEntry,
1107		nProxyCfg *graph.EffectiveNginxProxy,
1108		baseAnnotations map[string]string,
1109	) ([]corev1.ContainerPort, map[string]string) {
1110		// Determine which port numbers have multiple protocols for naming.
1111		protocolsPerPort := make(map[int32]int)
1112		for _, entry := range ports {
1113			protocolsPerPort[entry.Port]++
1114		}
1115		containerPorts := make([]corev1.ContainerPort, 0, len(ports))
1116		for _, entry := range ports {
1117			name := fmt.Sprintf("port-%d", entry.Port)
1118			if protocolsPerPort[entry.Port] > 1 {
1119				name = fmt.Sprintf("port-%d-%s", entry.Port, strings.ToLower(string(entry.Protocol)))
1120			}
1121			containerPort := corev1.ContainerPort{
1122				Name:          name,
1123				ContainerPort: entry.Port,
1124				Protocol:      entry.Protocol,
1125			}
1126			containerPorts = append(containerPorts, containerPort)
1127		}
1128	
1129		podAnnotations := make(map[string]string)
1130		maps.Copy(podAnnotations, baseAnnotations)
1131	
1132		// Add metrics port if enabled
1133		if port, enabled := graph.MetricsEnabledForNginxProxy(nProxyCfg); enabled {
1134			metricsPort := config.DefaultNginxMetricsPort
1135			if port != nil {
1136				metricsPort = *port
1137			}
1138	
1139			containerPorts = append(containerPorts, corev1.ContainerPort{
1140				Name:          "metrics",
1141				ContainerPort: metricsPort,
1142			})
1143	
1144			podAnnotations["prometheus.io/scrape"] = "true"
1145			podAnnotations["prometheus.io/port"] = strconv.Itoa(int(metricsPort))
1146		}
1147	
1148		// need to sort ports so everytime buildNginxPodTemplateSpec is called it will generate the exact same
1149		// array of ports. This is needed to satisfy deterministic results of the method.
1150		sort.Slice(containerPorts, func(i, j int) bool {
1151			if containerPorts[i].ContainerPort != containerPorts[j].ContainerPort {
1152				return containerPorts[i].ContainerPort < containerPorts[j].ContainerPort
1153			}
1154			return containerPorts[i].Protocol < containerPorts[j].Protocol
1155		})
1156	
1157		return containerPorts, podAnnotations
1158	}

1187				{MountPath: "/var/run/secrets/ngf", Name: "nginx-agent-tls"},
1188				{MountPath: "/var/run/secrets/ngf/serviceaccount", Name: "token"},
1189				{MountPath: "/var/log/nginx-agent", Name: "nginx-agent-log"},
1190				{MountPath: "/var/lib/nginx-agent", Name: "nginx-agent-lib"},
1191				{MountPath: "/etc/nginx/conf.d", Name: "nginx-conf"},
1192				{MountPath: "/etc/nginx/stream-conf.d", Name: "nginx-stream-conf"},
1193				{MountPath: "/etc/nginx/main-includes", Name: "nginx-main-includes"},
1194				{MountPath: "/etc/nginx/events-includes", Name: "nginx-events-includes"},
1195				{MountPath: "/etc/nginx/secrets", Name: "nginx-secrets"},
1196				{MountPath: "/var/run/nginx", Name: "nginx-run"},
1197				{MountPath: "/var/cache/nginx", Name: "nginx-cache"},
1198				{MountPath: "/etc/nginx/includes", Name: "nginx-includes"},
1199			},

1326	// buildBasePodTemplateSpec builds the base pod template spec.

1328		objectMeta metav1.ObjectMeta,

1344				ServiceAccountName:           objectMeta.Name,

1349						{
1350							Name:  "net.ipv4.ip_unprivileged_port_start",

1360	// applyUserConfiguration applies user-defined configuration overrides.
1361	func (p *NginxProvisioner) applyUserConfiguration(
1362		spec *corev1.PodTemplateSpec,
1363		nProxyCfg *graph.EffectiveNginxProxy,
1364	) {
1365		if nProxyCfg == nil || nProxyCfg.Kubernetes == nil {
1366			return
1367		}
1368	
1369		var podSpec *ngfAPIv1alpha2.PodSpec
1370		var containerSpec *ngfAPIv1alpha2.ContainerSpec
1371	
1372		if nProxyCfg.Kubernetes.Deployment != nil {
1373			podSpec = &nProxyCfg.Kubernetes.Deployment.Pod
1374			containerSpec = &nProxyCfg.Kubernetes.Deployment.Container
1375		} else if nProxyCfg.Kubernetes.DaemonSet != nil {
1376			podSpec = &nProxyCfg.Kubernetes.DaemonSet.Pod
1377			containerSpec = &nProxyCfg.Kubernetes.DaemonSet.Container
1378		}
1379	
1380		// Apply pod-level configuration
1381		if podSpec != nil {
1382			spec.Spec.TerminationGracePeriodSeconds = podSpec.TerminationGracePeriodSeconds
1383			spec.Spec.Affinity = podSpec.Affinity
1384			spec.Spec.NodeSelector = podSpec.NodeSelector
1385			spec.Spec.Tolerations = podSpec.Tolerations
1386			spec.Spec.Volumes = append(spec.Spec.Volumes, podSpec.Volumes...)
1387			spec.Spec.TopologySpreadConstraints = podSpec.TopologySpreadConstraints
1388		}
1389	
1390		// Apply container-level configuration (NGINX container only)
1391		if containerSpec != nil {
1392			container := spec.Spec.Containers[0]
1393			if containerSpec.Resources != nil {
1394				container.Resources = *containerSpec.Resources
1395			}
1396			container.Lifecycle = containerSpec.Lifecycle
1397			container.VolumeMounts = append(container.VolumeMounts, containerSpec.VolumeMounts...)
1398	
1399			if containerSpec.Debug != nil && *containerSpec.Debug {
1400				container.Command = append(container.Command, "/agent/entrypoint.sh")
1401				container.Args = append(container.Args, "debug")
1402			}
1403	
1404			for _, hostPort := range containerSpec.HostPorts {
1405				for i, port := range container.Ports {
1406					if hostPort.ContainerPort == port.ContainerPort {
1407						container.Ports[i].HostPort = hostPort.Port
1408					}
1409				}
1410			}
1411	
1412			spec.Spec.Containers[0] = container
1413		}
1414	}
1415	
1416	// configureImagePullSecrets configures image pull secrets.
1417	func (p *NginxProvisioner) configureImagePullSecrets(
1418		spec *corev1.PodTemplateSpec,
1419		names resourceNames,
1420	) {
1421		for name := range names.dockerSecrets {
1422			ref := corev1.LocalObjectReference{Name: name}
1423			spec.Spec.ImagePullSecrets = append(spec.Spec.ImagePullSecrets, ref)
1424		}
1425	
1426		// need to sort secret names so everytime buildNginxPodTemplateSpec is called it will generate the exact same
1427		// array of secrets. This is needed to satisfy deterministic results of the method.
1428		sort.Slice(spec.Spec.ImagePullSecrets, func(i, j int) bool {
1429			return spec.Spec.ImagePullSecrets[i].Name < spec.Spec.ImagePullSecrets[j].Name
1430		})
1431	}
1432	
1433	// configureNginxPlus configures NGINX Plus specific settings.
1434	func (p *NginxProvisioner) configureNginxPlus(
1435		spec *corev1.PodTemplateSpec,
1436		names resourceNames,
1437	) {
1438		// Update init container command
1439		initCmd := spec.Spec.InitContainers[0].Command
1440		initCmd = append(initCmd,
1441			"--source", "/includes/mgmt.conf",
1442			"--destination", "/etc/nginx/main-includes",
1443			"--nginx-plus",
1444		)
1445		spec.Spec.InitContainers[0].Command = initCmd
1446	
1447		// Add NGINX Plus volumes and volume mounts
1448		volumeMounts := spec.Spec.Containers[0].VolumeMounts
1449	
1450		// Add nginx-lib volume
1451		volumeMounts = append(volumeMounts, corev1.VolumeMount{
1452			Name:      "nginx-lib",
1453			MountPath: "/var/lib/nginx/state",
1454		})
1455		spec.Spec.Volumes = append(spec.Spec.Volumes, corev1.Volume{
1456			Name:         "nginx-lib",
1457			VolumeSource: emptyDirVolumeSource,
1458		})
1459	
1460		// Add JWT license if configured
1461		if names.jwt != "" {
1462			volumeMounts = append(volumeMounts, corev1.VolumeMount{
1463				Name:      "nginx-plus-license",
1464				MountPath: "/etc/nginx/" + secrets.LicenseJWTKey,
1465				SubPath:   secrets.LicenseJWTKey,
1466			})
1467			spec.Spec.Volumes = append(spec.Spec.Volumes, corev1.Volume{
1468				Name:         "nginx-plus-license",
1469				VolumeSource: corev1.VolumeSource{Secret: &corev1.SecretVolumeSource{SecretName: names.jwt}},
1470			})
1471		}
1472	
1473		// Add usage certs if configured
1474		if names.ca != "" || names.clientSSL != "" {
1475			volumeMounts = append(volumeMounts, corev1.VolumeMount{
1476				Name:      "nginx-plus-usage-certs",
1477				MountPath: "/etc/nginx/certs-bootstrap/",
1478			})
1479	
1480			sources := []corev1.VolumeProjection{}
1481			if names.ca != "" {
1482				sources = append(sources, corev1.VolumeProjection{
1483					Secret: &corev1.SecretProjection{
1484						LocalObjectReference: corev1.LocalObjectReference{Name: names.ca},
1485					},
1486				})
1487			}
1488			if names.clientSSL != "" {
1489				sources = append(sources, corev1.VolumeProjection{
1490					Secret: &corev1.SecretProjection{
1491						LocalObjectReference: corev1.LocalObjectReference{Name: names.clientSSL},
1492					},
1493				})
1494			}
1495	
1496			spec.Spec.Volumes = append(spec.Spec.Volumes, corev1.Volume{
1497				Name: "nginx-plus-usage-certs",
1498				VolumeSource: corev1.VolumeSource{
1499					Projected: &corev1.ProjectedVolumeSource{
1500						Sources: sources,
1501					},
1502				},
1503			})
1504		}
1505	
1506		spec.Spec.Containers[0].VolumeMounts = volumeMounts
1507	}
1508	
1509	// configureDataplaneKeySecret configures the dataplane key secret for NGINX One Console telemetry.
1510	func (p *NginxProvisioner) configureDataplaneKeySecret(
1511		spec *corev1.PodTemplateSpec,
1512		names resourceNames,
1513	) {
1514		volumeMounts := spec.Spec.Containers[0].VolumeMounts
1515	
1516		volumeMounts = append(volumeMounts, corev1.VolumeMount{
1517			Name:      "agent-dataplane-key",
